zh.Crichton, Midlothian, Scotland: 蘇格蘭米德洛迪安克萊頓
zh.Cramstoun Ridell, Midlothian, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安
zh.lifeSummary: 當Deborah Erskine於1440年出生在蘇格蘭艾丁波時，她的父親Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine30歲，母親Janet Elisabeth Douglas25歲。她於1460年之前與Sir David Crichton of Cranstoun-Riddle在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1478年在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安克萊頓享年38歲。

zh-hans.Crichton, Midlothian, Scotland: 苏格兰米德洛迪安克萊頓
zh-hans.Cramstoun Ridell, Midlothian, Scotland: 英国苏格兰米德洛迪安
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Deborah Erskine于1440年出生在苏格兰艾丁波时，她的父亲Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine30岁，母亲Janet Elisabeth Douglas25岁。她于1460年之前与Sir David Crichton of Cranstoun-Riddle在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1478年在苏格兰米德洛迪安克萊頓享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: Erskine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the barony of Erskine in Renfrewshire, first recorded in 1226 in the form Erskyn.
History: A family of this name have held a number of Scottish titles, including the earldoms of Mar, Buchan, Kellie, and Rosslyn.

variants.name: Erskin
meanings: Scottish (central Scotland and Fife): variant of   Erskine  . This form of the surname is now more common in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Deborah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘bee’ in Hebrew), borne by the nurse of Rebecca (Genesis 35:8) and by a woman judge and prophet (Judges 4–5) who led the Israelites to victory over the Canaanites. It has always been popular as a Jewish name. It was in use among Christians by the mid 16th century and was taken up by the Puritans in the 17th century, in part because the bee was a symbol of industriousness. Since then it has enjoyed enormous popularity, peaking in the 1960s. Among other famous bearers is the actress  Deborah Kerr  (  1921–2007 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Deborah Erskine was born in 1440, in Edinburgh, Scotland, her father, Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine, was 30 and her mother, Janet Elisabeth Douglas, was 25. She married Sir David Crichton of Cranstoun-Riddle before 1460, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1478, in Crichton, Midlothian, Scotland, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Deborah Erskine est née en 1440, à Edinburgh, Écosse, son père, Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Janet Elisabeth Douglas, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir David Crichton of Cranstoun-Riddle avant 1460, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1478, à Crichton, Midlothian, Écosse, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Deborah Erskine 1440 in Edinburgh, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine 30 und ihre Mutter Janet Elisabeth Douglas 25. Sie hat vor 1460 in Schottland, United Kingdom Sir David Crichton of Cranstoun-Riddle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1478 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Crichton, Midlothian, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Deborah Erskine è nata il nel 1440 nel Edinburgh, Scotland, sua padre, Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Janet Elisabeth Douglas, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Sir David Crichton of Cranstoun-Riddle prima del 1460, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1478, nel Crichton, Midlothian, Scotland, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Deborah Erskineが1440年にスコットランドエディンブルグで生まれた時，父Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskineは30歳，母Janet Elisabeth Douglasは25歳であった。1460年以前にイギリススコットランドでSir David Crichton of Cranstoun-Riddleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1478年にスコットランドミドロスアンクリチトンで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Deborah Erskine(이)가 1440년 스컷랜드 에딘버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Janet Elisabeth Douglas(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1460년 이전 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Sir David Crichton of Cranstoun-Riddle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1478년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 크리ch턴에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Deborah Erskine nasceu em 1440, em Edinburgh, Scotland, seu pai, Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Janet Elisabeth Douglas, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir David Crichton of Cranstoun-Riddle antes 1460, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1478, em Crichton, Midlothian, Scotland, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Deborah Erskine родилась в 1440 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Janet Elisabeth Douglas, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir David Crichton of Cranstoun-Riddle перед 1460 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1478 г. в местности кричтон, мидлотян, Шотландия в возрасте 38 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Deborah Erskine nació en 1440, en Edinburgh, Scotland, su papá, Thomas Erskine 2nd Lord of Erskine, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Janet Elisabeth Douglas, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Sir David Crichton of Cranstoun-Riddle antes de 1460, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1478, en Crichton, Midlothian, Scotland, a la edad de 38 años.
